Package jline.api

Class MAM

java.lang.Object
jline.api.MAM
public class MAM extends Object
APIs for Matrix-Analytic Methods and Markovian Arrival Processes (MAPs).

  • Method Details

    • mmap_compress

      public static Map<Integer,Matrix> mmap_compress(Map<Integer,Matrix> MMAP, SolverOptions config)
      Compress a Marked Markovian Arrival processes.
      Parameters:
      MMAP - - representation of the MMAP
      config - - configuration options
      Returns:
      compressed representation

    • mmap_compress

      public static Map<Integer,Matrix> mmap_compress(Map<Integer,Matrix> MMAP)
      Compress a Marked Markovian Arrival processes as a mixture of 2-state acyclic Markovian Arrival Processes
      Parameters:
      MMAP - - representation of the MMAP
      Returns:
      compressed representation

    • ph_reindex

      public static Map<Integer,Map<Integer,Map<Integer,Matrix>>> ph_reindex(Map<Station,Map<JobClass,Map<Integer,Matrix>>> PHs, NetworkStruct sn)
      Re-indexes a collection of phase-type distributions (PHs)
      Parameters:
      PHs - - a collection of PHs indexed by station and class objects
      Returns:
      a collection of PHs indexed by station and class indexes

    • mmap_shorten

      public static Map<Integer,Matrix> mmap_shorten(Map<Integer,Matrix> mmap)
      Convert the M3A MMAP representation into the shorter BUTools representation. In M3A a MMAP is represented as MAP followed by D1 markings: D0,D1,D1a,D1b,.. In BUTools a MMAP is represented as D0 followed by D1 markings: D0,D1a,D1b,..
      Parameters:
      mmap - - representation of the MMAP into M3A format
      Returns:
      MMAP representation in BUTools format
